package rulecoverage

func NegativeDtoToModelMappingInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "dto_to_model_mapping_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that own transport-to-model mapping instead of dedicated mappers or services."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
